text.tspan: n sequence was set to 40. Meaning that 40 t/4 = 10 T were observed?
every 2T, one complete step is performed. If only osccilation happenes, then
after 2T one peak in +x and after another 2T one in -x happen.
Between two peaks on top there is 80 ms
Meaning: between a peak on top and the alternating peak on the bottom there is 40 ms
